   "source": [
    "# Tutorial 19 - extract_ocv_iocv"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "102dff6ed840c830",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "79e029b8403acba3",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:28.373406600Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:28.367754400Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 7
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "7464f69370048fea",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "913f64d76d31c3ec",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:28.381743Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:28.373921400Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 8
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "dca5318f3a5d9058",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:32.024979Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:28.381743Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.read(\n",
    "    input_path=str(Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\" / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\"),\n",
    "    config=eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 9
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "307081f795f22896",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Step 1: extract_ocv_iocv"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:32.032273100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:32.026488600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "config = eet.battery_config_wrapper(c_ref=4.75, max_voltage=4.2, min_voltage=2.5)"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 10
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "62c11fb713f7cd5",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:32.388668100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:32.032273100Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "standardized_data.plot(x=\"Test_Time[s]\", y=[\"Voltage[V]\", \"Current[A]\"], subplots=True)"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "array([<Axes: xlabel='Test_Time[s]'>, <Axes: xlabel='Test_Time[s]'>],\n",
       "      dtype=object)"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 11,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 2 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     }
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 11
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "8ce09a2468014d4c",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:34.591828200Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T07:14:32.389671900Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "ocv_blocks = eet.extract_ocv_iocv(\n",
    "    df=standardized_data,\n",
    "    config=config,\n",
    "    visualize=True,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x800 with 1 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     }
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 12
  }
